message:
fix: stream throttle cooperative budget, transport fallback routing, pool waiter index, mock stream emptiness

Four correctness fixes across different subsystems:

1. Stream Throttle (src/stream/throttle.rs): Add MAX_SUPPRESSED_DRAIN_PER_POLL (64)
   cooperative budget. Previously, an always-ready inner stream could monopolize the
   executor forever while the throttle window was closed, because suppressed items were
   drained in an unbounded loop. Now yields Poll::Pending after 64 suppressed items and
   schedules a wake to resume later. New test with AlwaysReadyStream validates the bound.

2. Transport Router (src/transport/router.rs): Add .or_else() fallback to RoundRobin
   and HashBased strategies. When the modulo-selected endpoint is unreachable due to
   concurrent state changes between the filter count and nth() call, the router now
   falls back to the first available endpoint instead of returning None. Also: replace
   .filter().last() with .rfind() in WeightedRoundRobin for single-pass efficiency.

3. Pool Waiter (src/sync/pool.rs): Use the already-computed `pos` index to remove
   waiters instead of redundantly searching by waiter_id with .iter().position().
   The old code could also fail silently if the waiter was not found by ID due to
   concurrent modification.

4. Mock Transport (src/transport/mock.rs): SimSymbolStream::is_empty() now checks
   both self.pending and state.queue, so a delayed symbol that has been popped from
   the queue but not yet yielded doesn't cause is_empty() to return true prematurely.
   New test: `sim_stream_is_not_empty_while_delayed_symbol_is_pending`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
